title: how to trace internal signals of multi insts of a module(hier_block).

features.name: multiple module instantiation for tracing
features.description: Code should include a module instantiated multiple times (8 instances) within a parent module for hierarchical tracing

features.name: three_level_module_hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a three-level module hierarchy with top module instantiating intermediate modules which in turn instantiate leaf modules

features.name: hier_block_tracing_configuration
features.description: Code should include verilator hier_block configuration directive for tracing multiple instances of specified modules
